releaseValidation.command: node scripts/tauri-parity-gate.mjs && CODE_TAURI_REQUIRE_REAL_WORKBENCH=1 CODE_TAURI_WORKBENCH_PATH=out/vs/code/browser/workbench/workbench.html npm run smoketest:tauri:workbench && CODE_TAURI_REQUIRE_REAL_WORKBENCH=1 CODE_TAURI_WORKBENCH_PATH=out/vs/code/browser/workbench/workbench.html npm run package:tauri:release-validate

lastCiResult.summary: Blocked until ReleaseCandidate; scaffold fallback forbidden for release validation.
Blocked until cargo clippy passes with warnings denied. Migration remains Scaffold.
Static scaffold and source smoke guards present.

gates.command: npm run compile-build && cargo build --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features runtime

lastCiResult.summary: Not promoted from Scaffold until clean CI runtime build is recorded.
Blocked until real workbench boot passes without src-tauri/www/index.html.

gates.command: npm run smoketest:tauri && npm run test-node -- --runGlob src/vs/platform/tauri/test/common/*.test.ts

lastCiResult.summary: Blocked until file, watcher, channel, terminal, and service parity suites pass.

gates.command: CODE_TAURI_REQUIRE_REAL_WORKBENCH=1 CODE_TAURI_WORKBENCH_PATH=out/vs/code/browser/workbench/workbench.html npm run test-extension:tauri-sidecar:execute && npm run smoketest:tauri

lastCiResult.summary: Blocked until extension host bridge, lifecycle, API, and proposed API suites pass.

gates.command: npm run smoketest:tauri && npm run smoketest:tauri:builtin-extensions && node build/lib/builtInExtensions.ts

lastCiResult.summary: Blocked until deterministic built-in extension preflight plus Git, TypeScript/tsserver, debug, terminal, notebooks, auth, tunnels, Copilot-relevant API, and file I/O parity pass.

artifacts.osCheckCommand: codesign --verify --deep --strict <app> && spctl --assess --type execute <app> && hdiutil verify <dmg> && hdiutil attach <dmg> && cp -R <mounted-app> /Applications/ && open -W -a "VS Code Atomic" --args --version
Get-AuthenticodeSignature <installer>; Start-Process <installer> -ArgumentList /S -Wait; & "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Programs\VS Code Atomic\VS Code Atomic.exe" --version

lastCiResult.summary: Blocked until signed, notarized where required, installable, launchable artifacts pass.

gates.command: node scripts/tauri-parity-gate.mjs && CODE_TAURI_REQUIRE_REAL_WORKBENCH=1 CODE_TAURI_WORKBENCH_PATH=out/vs/code/browser/workbench/workbench.html npm run smoketest:tauri:workbench && CODE_TAURI_REQUIRE_REAL_WORKBENCH=1 CODE_TAURI_WORKBENCH_PATH=out/vs/code/browser/workbench/workbench.html npm run package:tauri:release-validate && CODE_TAURI_REQUIRE_REAL_WORKBENCH=1 CODE_TAURI_WORKBENCH_PATH=out/vs/code/browser/workbench/workbench.html npm run package:tauri -- --target <rust-target-triple> --bundles <bundle-list>
